title: AXListScrollIndexChanged
description: Payload emitted when the scrolled item index changes in AXListComponent.

props.name: index
props.description: The current first visible item index in the viewport.

props.name: htmlElement
props.description: Component host element. Inherited from AXEvent.

props.name: isUserInteraction
props.description: Whether the event originated from user interaction. Inherited from AXEvent.
